title: falsification_criterion lacks an ablation / marginal-lift-over-baseline term
source: loop-a-tick #14 D2 (BULL_QUIET): DA high-severity objection — proposal commits in prose to a momentum-only vs momentum+gate ablation as 'the decisive test', but falsification_criterion has no term encoding it. Same momentum-on-momentum risk recurred in tick 13 (BULL_STRESSED).
why: falsification_criterion only carries ABSOLUTE thresholds (median_active_fold_sharpe_min, n_trades_total_min, per-episode survival). When a regime gate is partly collinear with the primary it sits on (e.g. real_yield_5y_z252d shares ~24% variance with roc_63, and the primary is momentum_zscore), the gated strategy can clear an absolute Sharpe floor purely on the inherited momentum component while the gate adds zero or negative marginal value -- and the audit would PROMOTE it. This is exactly the QC 'squeeze the orange twice' failure the project already guards against in principle (rule-based primary + ML meta on RICHER features). There is currently no way for a proposal to make 'the gate must beat the ungated primary' a binding survival condition.
value_rationale: High: without a marginal-lift gate, Loop A can mint 'survivors' whose entire edge is the primary's, defeating the point of the regime-conditional feature gate and risking a false-positive promotion into the (expensive, trust-bearing) M3 audit and beyond. Affects every gated proposal, not a one-off.
recommendation: Add an optional ablation term to FalsificationCriterion, e.g. gated_minus_primary_only_sharpe_min (or expectancy delta) that requires the momentum+gate strategy to beat the ungated primary by a positive margin across active folds. The M3 audit must compute both arms (primary-only and primary+gate) and gate survival on the delta, not just the absolute. Hypothesizer should auto-include it whenever feature_overrides.add is non-empty AND any added feature is collinear (|corr| above a threshold) with a regime-defining feature. Coordinate with the methodology spec + phase5.run_proposal audit harness.
out_of_scope: Not changing absolute-threshold gates; the ablation term is additive.
